name: webobsidian
description: WebObsidian — a self-hosted Obsidian-compatible web app

scripts.build: npm --workspace web run build && npm --workspace server run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace server run typecheck && npm --workspace web run typecheck
scripts.desktop: npm run build && npm --workspace desktop run dev
scripts.desktop:dist: npm run build && npm --workspace desktop run dist
scripts.desktop:publish: npm run build && npm --workspace desktop run dist:publish
